rulings.Case Title: GARY WAI SHING WONG et al VS. FIRST CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 15, 2012, line 1. Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint. Sustain without leave to amend. See Malkoskie v. Option One Mortgage, 188 CA4 968 directly on point. = (501/REQ)
